name: glossa
description: Managed MCP relay for explicitly exposed local coding workspaces.

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build --workspace @glossa/protocol && npm run build --workspace @ariobarin/glossa && npm run build --workspace @glossa/relay
scripts.check: npm run docs:check && npm run site:check && npm run build && npm test
scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @glossa/protocol && npm run dev --workspace @glossa/relay
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @glossa/relay && npm run test --workspace @ariobarin/glossa
